steps.title: Read the two table values
steps.content: The table shows $365$ employees for warehouse stores and $130$ employees for supermarkets.

steps.title: Subtract because it asks how much greater
steps.content: The difference is $$365-130=235$$ So warehouse stores averaged $235$ more employees than supermarkets.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $83$, compares department stores with supermarkets.
  • Choice B, $152$, compares warehouse stores with department stores.
  • Choice C, $235$, is $365-130$. Correct.
  • Choice D, $495$, is $365+130$, but the question asks for a difference.
That matches choice C.
